title: How to find all assigned tasks across boards
excerpt: The only option we can find for viewing assigned tasks across multiple boards is the My Week section. However this only works well if dates/timelines have been added. It also has tasks come up which have already been mar…

posts.author: rachel.findlay (Rachel Findlay)
posts.cookedHtml:
The only option we can find for viewing assigned tasks across multiple boards is the My Week section. However this only works well if dates/timelines have been added. It also has tasks come up which have already been marked as done.

The dashboard widgets cannot be filtered for tasks only assigned to a particular person. Hence it’s difficult to find out what is assigned to you across multiple boards.

Thanks,
Rachel

posts.author: caseyparnis (Casey Parnis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rachel,

We use the “search everything” function to do this, although I wish there was a link we could click on the sidebar or something rather than having to type a name in the search bar to see this information.
